scripts.verify:fast: npm run db:migrate:verify && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit
scripts.test: npm run verify:fast && npm run build && npm run test:api
scripts.cf:preview: node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build && node node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js pages dev dist
scripts.db:migrate:local: node node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js d1 migrations apply medace-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:verify: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); cleanup() { rm -rf "$tmpdir"; }; trap cleanup EXIT; node node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js d1 migrations apply medace-db --local --persist-to "$tmpdir"'
scripts.db:migrate:remote: node node_modules/wrangler/bin/wrangler.js d1 migrations apply medace-db --remote
